message:
test(e2e): add Track I autocommit retained-txn tests (bd-iuvw4)

Add comprehensive E2E tests for retained autocommit transaction behavior:
- Flush overhead reduction verification
- Read-after-write correctness with immediate SELECT
- Connection close flush durability
- 10K insert throughput oracle comparison
- Interleaved read/write pattern correctness

All tests verify concurrent_mode_default stays enabled per project invariant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
